overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-slicked neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character traverses sidewalks, ascends and descends staircases connecting elevated walkways, and moves through covered corridors while surrounded by towering buildings with massive digital billboards and moderate vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city street with digital billboards and neon signage

events.description: red sports car drives past on the left side of the street
pedestrian ahead comes into clearer view walking in same direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to a busy multi-lane street with neon-lit buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: massive red digital billboard with white logo mounted on building facade
yellow elevated roadway structure crossing above the street ahead
dark building facade with metal shutters and industrial texture
tall street lamp illuminating the sidewalk with warm light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet concrete sidewalk at street level in a neon-lit cyberpunk city. A large red digital billboard dominates the left side while an elevated yellow highway ramp looms ahead. A pedestrian walks ahead in the same direction, and vehicles pass by on the multi-lane street to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: yellow painted staircase ascending to elevated walkway

events.description: begins ascending the bright yellow painted staircase on the right side of the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: climbing the yellow painted stairs to reach the elevated pedestrian walkway above the street

entered.detail: bright yellow painted metal railings lining both sides of the staircase
transparent glass elevator structure attached to the building on the right

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep staircase with bright yellow railings, leaving the street level behind. The large digital billboard and elevated highway structure become closer and more prominent as the character climbs toward the elevated walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with glass railings overlooking traffic

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters the elevated walkway with glass safety railings
large bus or tram passes below on the street visible through the glass railing

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated walkway looking down at the traffic below through glass railings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the opposite direction on the elevated walkway

entered.detail: transparent glass panels with metal frames along the walkway edge overlooking the street
tall building with vertical neon signage and illuminated windows
modern building with illuminated curved glass facade
building facade covered in red neon signage and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated pedestrian walkway with glass railings, overlooking the busy street below. A pedestrian passes by in the opposite direction. The view opens up to show towering buildings with elaborate neon signage and a curved glass building on the right, while a large vehicle passes beneath the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza at street level with shops and reflective wet pavement

events.description: begins descending the concrete stairs at the end of the elevated walkway
reaches bottom of stairs and enters the open plaza area with a central kiosk

agents.ego_description: descending the stairs and walking through the open plaza toward the next staircase

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs leading down from the elevated walkway to plaza level
small illuminated shop or food stand with glowing signage in the center of the plaza
elevated pedestrian bridge crossing above the plaza area
skyscraper with vertical neon lighting and corporate signage

segments.scene_description: The character descends from the elevated walkway into an open plaza with wet reflective pavement. A small illuminated kiosk stands in the center of the plaza, and an overhead walkway bridge is visible to the right. The character walks toward another staircase at the far end of the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian bridge with digital advertising screens

events.description: begins ascending the final concrete staircase into the covered walkway
enters the fully covered corridor section with ceiling-mounted lighting

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs and entering the covered walkway with digital advertisements on the walls

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs leading up into the covered pedestrian bridge
large illuminated digital billboards displaying advertisements on the corridor walls
metal beam ceiling with integrated lighting covering the pedestrian bridge
illuminated vending machine or information terminal against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the final staircase into a covered pedestrian bridge. The environment transitions from open plaza to an enclosed corridor with a metal ceiling and walls lined with glowing digital advertising screens. A vending machine stands against the right wall as the character walks deeper into the covered walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a rain-slicked street level up through elevated walkways and finally into an enclosed urban corridor. It begins on a wet concrete sidewalk beneath a massive red digital billboard, moving past passing vehicles toward a looming yellow highway ramp. As the character ascends a steep staircase with bright yellow railings, the perspective shifts upward to an elevated pedestrian walkway with glass railings that overlooks the busy city traffic and towering neon signage. The scene then descends from the heights into an open plaza with reflective pavement and a central illuminated kiosk before turning toward another set of stairs. Finally, the camera follows the character as they climb into a covered pedestrian bridge, where the open city air gives way to an enclosed corridor lined with glowing advertising screens and a vending machine.
